inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman with dark brown layered curtain bangs framing angular features and strong defined brows, confident powerful expression with smoky bronze eyeshadow and gradient lips. She stands in an autumn park, golden maple leaves drifting around her, wearing an oversized vintage band t-shirt tucked loosely into black leather boots. Shot on 35mm lens, environmental portrait capturing her reflection in a rain-puddle on the stone path, golden hour warm side light casting long amber shadows across her face. Negative space opens to the left revealing bokeh of orange and crimson foliage. One hand pushing hair back, chin slightly lifted, gaze piercing through the reflection. Flawless luminous skin, editorial photography, cinematic film grain, dramatic atmosphere.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, oversaturated, harsh lighting, plastic skin
